_comment_env: Required env vars per profile (set with `eas secret:create` or in eas.json `env` blocks below). Names mirror root .env.example. The mobile bundle only ever ships PUBLIC values — EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (anon key only, NEVER the service-role key), and EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL (the @fa/web origin for Plaid exchange / Stripe checkout). EXPO_ACCESS_TOKEN is used by EAS infra for push, not bundled. projectId comes from app.config.ts -> extra.eas.projectId (run `eas init` to fill in the current TODO placeholder).
